reason: Manual review required: HOLD-class primitive(s): Outbound token transfer exceeds the context-free exact integer range.

findings.label: Outbound token transfer exceeds the context-free exact integer range
findings.detail: This transaction sends 18446744073709551615 raw token units to a non-signer account. The amount exceeds JavaScript's exact integer range and cannot be treated as a routine transfer without mint decimals and value context.
findings.mapsToLoss: An extremely large raw token amount can represent a full-balance drain or an amount that downstream displays round incorrectly.
